description: Whether per-agent model overrides are supported, allowing different agents to use different AI models.

claude-code.mechanism: model frontmatter field accepts sonnet/opus/haiku alias, full model ID, or inherit (default); per-agent override

codex.mechanism: role config_file can override model and model_reasoning_effort; caller's current profile and model_provider preserved unless explicitly overridden

copilot-cli.mechanism: model field in frontmatter overrides default model for that agent

cursor.mechanism: model frontmatter field selects a specific model for the agent, overriding the session default.

factory-droid.mechanism: per-droid model preference field independent of global model setting; enables mixed-model agent compositions

gemini-cli.mechanism: model frontmatter field (string); accepts a specific model id (e.g., 'gemini-3-preview') or 'inherit' (default) which uses the parent session's model. Optional 'temperature' field (0.0-2.0, default 1) sets per-subagent sampling temperature.

kiro.mechanism: model field in agent JSON config overrides workspace default for that agent

opencode.mechanism: Frontmatter model field selects a specific model alias or full model string for the agent, overriding the session default.

roo-code.mechanism: No per-mode model selection field documented in the mode schema
